visual_description:
A group of people, mostly men in light blue collared shirts, stand in a line in an office, all facing a television mounted on a dark, textured wall. The camera is positioned behind them, showing their backs as they watch the screen intently. The office has a modern feel with glass partitions and a large window to the left. A single, industrial-style light fixture hangs from the ceiling. In the top left corner of the frame, white Chinese characters are visible. The shot is static. The audio begins with a female voice speaking in a clear, formal, and authoritative tone, as if making an official statement. She says, "表示会尽快破案" (We will solve the case as soon as possible). The background is quiet, with no music or other prominent sound effects.

The scene cuts to a shaky, close-up shot from inside a moving vehicle. The view is through a car window, which is obscured by the dark, leafy shadows of trees passing by. The camera pans slightly, creating a sense of motion and urgency. The same white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The shot is unsteady, enhancing the feeling of a tense or chaotic moment. The scene then cuts to a male voice, speaking in a low, excited
